case_title: WEI CHUEN LIAO et al VS. FRYE CLAIMS CONSULATION AND ADMINISTRATION, INC et al

docket_entries.description: REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOS TO DEFTS DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT FRYE CLAIMS CONSULATION AND ADMINISTRATION, INC WESTERN HERITAGE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-01-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-03-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR DEFENDANT(S) TO FILE ORDER RE DEMURRER AND JUDGMENT THEREON. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

BUSINESS TORT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIAO, WEI CHUEN AMERICAN COMMERCIAL MEDIA CA AS TO DEFENDANT FRYE CLAIMS CONSULATION AND ADMINISTRATION, INC WESTERN HERITAGE INSURANCE COMPANY DOES 1 TO 20 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-27-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-17-2012

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS FRYE CLAIMS CONSULTATION AND ADMINISTRATION, INC. AND WESTERN HERITAGE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFFS' FAILURE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS AS REQUIRED BY LOCAL RULE 2.6B HAS PREVENTED THE COURT FROM LEARNING PLAINTIFFS' POSITION(S). PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS FRYE CLAIMS CONSULTATION AND ADMINISTRATION, INC AND WESTERN HERITAGE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiffs' failure to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B has prevented the court from learning plaintiffs' position(s). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
